name: amelia
ai_summary: Amelia has 2.5 years of childcare experience with infants to age 12, enjoys teaching and accommodating children with special needs, and is located in Richmond Hill, GA with part-time weekday afternoon availability. She resolves conflicts by separating children, assessing individually, involving parents for biting incidents, and believes her flexible schedule and adaptability to diverse groups make her a good fit.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Amelia and I've been working in childcare for the past two and a half years. I've been working with ages, nine weeks to 12 years old. And I really enjoy working in childcare because I love being able to teach and also being able to accommodate those who need more, help, learning with disabilities and other
 Other things like that.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Richmond Hill Georgia, but I'm open to being in the surrounding areas of Pooler and Savannah, Georgia.
transcripts.q5:
I'm looking for part-time mostly during the week and I'm looking for
 11:32 6:00 ish, hopefully.

if there's conflict between two children, then first, I will assess the situation and I'll separate them and then go to each child individually, and first the child that is bit, I'll ask if the child is okay and what the issue was and what was causing this, and then I would result in the child that
 bit the child to call their parents and or for them to stay in timeout for the rest of the period or during recess
